testcase.name: test_update_driver
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_drivers_geocode_ratings_iter56.py:123: in test_update_driver assert update_response.status_code == 200, f"Failed to update driver: {update_response.text}" E AssertionError: Failed to update driver: {"detail":[{"type":"missing","loc":["body","phone"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"name":"TEST_سائق_محدث","is_available":false},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"},{"type":"missing","loc":["body","branch_id"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"name":"TEST_سائق_محدث","is_available":false},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"}]} E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_assign_driver_to_order_invalid_order

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected 404/400/500/520, got 422 assert 422 in [404, 400, 500, 520] + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_drivers_geocode_ratings_iter56.py:309: in test_assign_driver_to_order_invalid_order assert response.status_code in [404, 400, 500, 520], f"Expected 404/400/500/520, got {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Expected 404/400/500/520, got 422 E assert 422 in [404, 400, 500, 520] E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_update_driver_location
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_drivers_geocode_ratings_iter56.py:376: in test_update_driver_location assert response.status_code == 200, f"Failed to update location: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Failed to update location: {"detail":"Method Not Allowed"} E assert 405 == 200 E + where 405 = <Response [405]>.status_code
